title: How Komorebi Plays
description: Four pastoral wards, one thoughtful battlefield — assemble a deck, outmaneuver rivals in turn-based duels, and climb the seasonal ladder at your own pace.

pillars.title: Calm Tactics
pillars.description: Trade blows on a living board where timing, lane pressure, and burst windows matter more than raw stats. Win the turn before you win the match.

pillars.title: Ward Collecting
pillars.description: Pull spirits from Shinrin, Naminami, Akari, and Takane — then stitch keywords, curves, and finishers into a list that rewards patient play.

pillars.title: Seasonal Ladder
pillars.description: Climb seasonal tiers, learn from losses, and refine your lines. The summit rewards players who adapt without losing their composure.
